heading: General Counsel

children.label: a
children.text: There is a General Counsel of the Department of the Army, appointed from civilian life by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate.

children.label: b
children.text: The General Counsel shall perform such functions as the Secretary of the Army may prescribe.
